description: Input parameters for analyzing phase separation role in receptor tyrosine kinase (RTK) signaling and drug targeting

rtk_signaling_characteristics.probability_issue: Low probability of RTK triggering defined cellular outcome

phase_separation_role.mechanism: Liquid-liquid phase separation (LLPS) at plasma membrane
phase_separation_role.function: Weight probabilistic signaling in favor of required outcome
phase_separation_role.benefit: Ensure mutual exclusivity in signal initiation

signaling_game_parameters.complexity: Numbers game requiring sufficient engaged receptors and effectors
signaling_game_parameters.challenge: Overcome background of redundant and nonfunctional signaling

llps_characteristics.effect: Influences receptor assembly and signaling fidelity
